name: StraboMicro2 v2.0.35
notes:
## StraboMicro2 v2.0.35

### Bug Fixes
- Append fs read stream directly to avoid DelayedStream crash
- Stream project upload to lift 2 GiB client-side limit
- Guard sibling/import/StraboTools create handlers against double-submission
- Guard New Micrograph Finish against double-submission
- Gate Viewer startup image load on project validation


---

### Downloads

| Platform | Download |
|----------|----------|
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.35-arm64.dmg` |
| macOS (Intel) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.35.dmg` |
| Windows | `StraboMicro2 Setup 2.0.35.exe` |
| Linux (AppImage) | `StraboMicro2-2.0.35.AppImage` |
| Linux (Debian) | `strabomicro2_2.0.35_amd64.deb` |

### Installation

**macOS**: Download the DMG, open it, and drag StraboMicro2 to your Applications folder.

**Windows**: Download and run the installer. If you see a SmartScreen warning, click "More info" then "Run anyway".

**Linux (AppImage)**: Download the AppImage, make it executable (`chmod +x`), and run with: `./StraboMicro2-*.AppImage --no-sandbox`

**Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)**: Install the .deb package: `sudo dpkg -i strabomicro2_*.deb`

name: StraboMicro2 v2.0.32
notes:
## StraboMicro2 v2.0.32

### Bug Fixes
- Resolve Documents folder via shell to handle OneDrive redirect
- Auto-expand ancestor tree nodes when adding a micrograph
- Unify save-before-switch prompt across all project-open flows
- Prompt to save dirty project before New Project replaces it
- Gate micrograph click on missing location, not just missing scale
- Stop injecting default scalePixelsPerCentimeter on save


---

name: StraboMicro2 v2.0.31
notes:
## StraboMicro2 v2.0.31

### New Features
- Rename scale method label to Copy Size and Location from Existing Micrograph
- Nudge rotation by 0.1-degree steps in placement coordinate fields
- Add editable X/Y/rotation coordinate fields to placement canvas

### Bug Fixes
- Share copy-size placement math; fix Copy Size in Edit Micrograph Location
- Report auto-calculated overlay scale relative to original parent
- Compensate for Group scale in affine overlay outline stroke


---

name: StraboMicro2 v2.0.26
notes:
## StraboMicro2 v2.0.26

### New Features
- Add 3-Point Registration option to Edit Micrograph Location dialog
- Add Micrograph Scale step to Edit Micrograph Metadata wizard
- Add ScaleEditorPanel reusable component
- Add cascade-aware scale update store action

### Bug Fixes
- Apply affine transform to recursive spots from 3-Point Registration children
- Cancel on unsaved-changes prompt aborts project switch instead of discarding changes
- Keep 3-Point Registration loading spinner visible until both images decode


---
